lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਮੀ ਵਸੰਦੀ ਪਾਣੀਐ ਈਧਣੁ ਰਖੈ ਭਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jimee vasandee paaneeai eedhan rakhai bhaeh |
lines.english: The earth is in the water, and the fire is contained in the wood.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਸਹੁ ਆਹਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਆਢਲਿ ਹਭੁ ਕੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak so sahu aaeh jaa kai aadtal habh ko |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, yearn for that Lord, who is the Support of all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਮੁ ਭਏ ਬਿਸਮਾਦ ਦੇਖਿ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਤੇਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: bisam bhe bisamaad dekh kudarat tereea |
lines.english: I am wonderstruck beholding the wonder of Your Almighty Creative Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਕੀਤੇ ਕੰਮ ਤੁਧੈ ਹੀ ਗੋਚਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tere keete kam tudhai hee gochare |
lines.english: The works which You have done, O Lord, could only have been performed by You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਵਰਤੈ ਜਗਿ ਜਿ ਕੀਆ ਤੁਧੁ ਧੁਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: soee varatai jag ji keea tudh dhure |
lines.english: That alone happens in the world, which You, O Master, have done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ਤੇਰੀ ਦਾਸ ਕਰਿ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਮੇਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: saran pare teree daas kar gat hoe mereea |
lines.english: I seek Your Sanctuary - I am Your slave; if it is Your Will, I shall be emancipated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੈ ਹਥਿ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: terai hath nidhaan bhaavai tis dehi |
lines.english: The treasure is in Your Hands; according to Your Will, You bestow it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਹੋਹਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jis no hohi kripaal su naam dhiaaeeai |11|
lines.english: One, unto whom You have been compassionate, meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੇਇ ਲੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis no hoe deaal har naam see lehi |
lines.english: One, upon whom You have bestowed Your Mercy, is blessed with the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar beant ant na paaeeai |
lines.english: You are unapproachable, unfathomable and infinite; Your limits cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਮੁਖ ਦਿਸੰਨੑਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਤੇ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: seee mukh disana naanak rate prem ras |1|
lines.english: I long to see the faces of those, O Nanak, who are imbued with the essence of the Lord's Love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੜਛੀਆ ਫਿਰੰਨੑਿ ਸੁਆਉ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੑਿ ਸੁਞੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: karrachheea firana suaau na jaanana suyeea |
lines.english: The ladles cruise through the food, but they do not know the taste of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈ ਸਹਿ ਦਿਤੀ ਵਾੜਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਖੇਤੁ ਨ ਛਿਜਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tai seh ditee vaarr naanak khet na chhijee |2|
lines.english: You, O Lord, have put up the fence; O Nanak, my fields shall not be plundered again. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜੀ ਲਧਮੁ ਖੋਜੁ ਛਡੀਆ ਉਜਾੜਿ ॥
lines.translit: khojee ladham khoj chhaddeea ujaarr |
lines.english: Through the Tracker, I discovered the tracks of those who ruined my crops.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਰਾਧਿਹੁ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਇ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: aaraadhihu sachaa soe sabh kichh jis paas |
lines.english: Worship in adoration that True Lord; everything is under His Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਹਾ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਖਸਮੁ ਆਪਿ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਕਰੇ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: duhaa siriaa khasam aap khin meh kare raas |
lines.english: He Himself is the Master of both ends; in an instant, He adjusts our affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਭਜਿ ਸੁਖੀ ਹੂੰ ਸੁਖ ਲਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: pau saranaaee bhaj sukhee hoon sukh lahu |
lines.english: Run to His Sanctuary, and you shall obtain the comfort of all comforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਆਗਹੁ ਸਗਲ ਉਪਾਵ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਗਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: tiaagahu sagal upaav tis kee ott gahu |
lines.english: Renounce all your efforts, and hold fast to His Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis no aap deaal tis man vutthiaa |
lines.english: The Lord abides in the mind of one who is blessed by His Kindness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੀਐ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: japeeai amrit naam bighan na lagai koe |
lines.english: Chanting the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, no obstacle shall block your way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਤਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਸੰਤਾ ਸੰਗੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam tat giaan santaa sang hoe |
lines.english: The karma of good deeds, the righteousness of Dharma and the essence of spiritual wisdom are obtained in the Society of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਈਅਨੑਿ ਸਭਿ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਸਾਹਿਬਿ ਤੁਠਿਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: paaeeana sabh nidhaan saahib tutthiaa |12|
lines.english: All treasures are obtained, when the Lord and Master is pleased. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੋ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਆ ਨ ਪਸੀਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eiko sirajanahaar naanak biaa na paseeai |1|
lines.english: There is One Creator; O Nanak, I do not see any other. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਧਮੁ ਲਭਣਹਾਰੁ ਕਰਮੁ ਕਰੰਦੋ ਮਾ ਪਿਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: ladham labhanahaar karam karando maa piree |
lines.english: I have found the object of my search - my Beloved took pity on me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪੜਿਆ ਪਛਾੜਿ ਬਾਣੁ ਸਚਾਵਾ ਸੰਨੑਿ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: paaparriaa pachhaarr baan sachaavaa sana kai |
lines.english: Take aim with the arrow of Truth, and shoot down sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੜਾ ਚਿਤਾਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਥੀਵਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur mantrarraa chitaar naanak dukh na theevee |2|
lines.english: Cherish the Words of the Guru's Mantra, O Nanak, and you shall not suffer in pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਧਾਰੀ ਸਮਰਥਿ ਚੁਕੇ ਬਿਲ ਬਿਲਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: deaa dhaaree samarath chuke bil bilaap |
lines.english: The all-powerful Lord has shown Mercy, and my cries of suffering are ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਸਦਾ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant miharavaan tis no sadaa jaap |
lines.english: He is Kind to all beings and creatures; meditate forever on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰ ਪਾਈਅਨੁ ਠਾਢਿ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: vaahu vaahu sirajanahaar paaeean tthaadt aap |
lines.english: Waaho! Waaho! The Creator Lord Himself has brought about peace and tranquility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਠੇ ਤਾਪ ਦੁਖ ਰੋਗ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਤਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: natthe taap dukh rog poore gur prataap |
lines.english: My fevers, pains and diseases are gone, by the Grace of the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤੀਅਨੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਰਖ ਗਰੀਬ ਨਿਵਾਜਿ ਥਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: keeteean aapanee rakh gareeb nivaaj thaap |
lines.english: The Lord has established me, and protected me; He is the Cherisher of the poor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਲਇਅਨੁ ਛਡਾਇ ਬੰਧਨ ਸਗਲ ਕਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: aape leian chhaddaae bandhan sagal kaap |
lines.english: He Himself has delivered me, breaking all my bonds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਨ ਬੁਝੀ ਆਸ ਪੁੰਨੀ ਮਨ ਸੰਤੋਖਿ ਧ੍ਰਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: tisan bujhee aas punee man santokh dhraap |
lines.english: My thirst is quenched, my hopes are fulfilled, and my mind is contented and satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੀ ਹੂੰ ਵਡਾ ਅਪਾਰ ਖਸਮੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਲੇਪੁ ਨ ਪੁੰਨਿ ਪਾਪਿ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: vaddee hoon vaddaa apaar khasam jis lep na pun paap |13|
lines.english: The greatest of the great, the Infinite Lord and Master - He is not affected by virtue and vice. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਭਏ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਈ ਜਪਾਤ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau bhe kripaal prabh har har seee japaat |
lines.english: They alone meditate on the Lord God, Har, Har, unto whom the Lord is Merciful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮੁ ਰਮਹੁ ਬਡਭਾਗੀਹੋ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: raam ramahu baddabhaageeho jal thal maheeal soe |
lines.english: Contemplate the Lord, O very fortunate ones; He is pervading in the water, the land and the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗੀ ਤਿਨ ਰਾਮ ਸਿਉ ਭੇਟਤ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਾਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak preet lagee tin raam siau bhettat saadh sangaat |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, they enshrine love for the Lord, meeting the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਅਰਾਧਿਐ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam araadhiai bighan na laagai koe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, worshipping the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mortal encounters no misfortune. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਹੋਇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਦੂਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis no hoe kripaal tis kaa dookh jaae |
lines.english: One unto whom You are Merciful, has his sufferings depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਟੇਕ ਰਤੇ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa teree ttek rate sach naae |
lines.english: Your devotees take to Your Support; they are imbued with the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕਾ ਬੋਲਿਆ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਵੈ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kaa boliaa paravaan hai daragah pavai thaae |
lines.english: The speech of the devotees is approved; it is accepted in the Court of the Lord.
